sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104456" key="tragalismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾰγᾰλ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n104456.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αἶκλον</ref></xr>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
